final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending-topic banner, urban dusk cityscape with dramatic light.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, handheld-feel mobile reportage in the spirit of Magnum street photography, sharp and immediate
Composition: ultra-wide 16:9 horizontal frame, low horizon line, generous sky and foreground negative space reserved for text overlay, 24mm wide-angle lens perspective
Subject: bustling city pedestrians in silhouette against a glowing dusk skyline, figures mid-stride conveying urgency and transience
Scene/backdrop: dense urban downtown at golden hour transitioning to blue hour — skyscrapers reflecting warm sunset orange on glass facades, neon signs and street lights beginning to illuminate, layered depth from foreground crowd to distant high-rises
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro — warm amber and deep crimson sunset backlight from the right horizon clashing with cool blue upper sky and emerging neon pink/cyan glow; high contrast, cinematic tension balanced with documentary authenticity
Color palette: warm amber and burnt orange as dominant sunset anchor, deep navy blue as sky counterweight, neon pink and cyan as accent points from signage, silhouetted figures in near-black
Materials/textures: glass curtain-wall reflections with visible light streaks, wet pavement with mirror-like puddle reflections, atmospheric haze adding depth
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" · "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" · "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: large bold headline "城市里的安静时刻" placed in a visually prominent clear zone (upper-left or center); subtitle "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" below headline in smaller weight; watermark "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" anchored bottom-right in small semi-transparent type; all text must be legible against the background
Avoid: stock-photo generic skyline clichés, over-saturated HDR tone-mapping, plastic neon glow, motion blur on text zones, cluttered composition with no breathing room, watermark-style copyright bugs unrelated to the specified text
